_source.name: ACS 2022 5-Year Estimates, Tables B25002 + B25004
_source.methodology: County-level vacancy rate (B25002_E003/B25002_E001) and seasonal vacancy fraction (B25004_E006/B25002_E001). Seasonal vacancy is the fraction that drives resort/rural over-prediction (e.g. Teton County WY ~60% seasonal).
